name: fork-ops
description: Agentic operations for maintained repository forks.

interface.shortDescription: Operate maintained forks from checked-in fork authority.
interface.longDescription: Fork Ops provides Codex skills, CLI commands, and an MCP server for discovering fork-local authority, validating .agents/fork-ops.toml, reporting fork capability levels, and assessing migration from existing fork-related materials.
defaultPrompt: Assess this fork for Fork Ops readiness.
